description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. A cheeky take on the classic penny loafer, this three-hole lace up suede shoe also references the boat shoe in its styling. Crafted in a beautiful tanned mocha and caramel leather colour block, this shoe is an off-duty essential. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt.UpperTwo-tone leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the mid footStitches on the seams of the toe boxThree-hole lace upsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionCurved midfootOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
